title: Make Add Comment button interactive only when comment field is filled

requirements.summary: Disable the 'Add Comment' button when the comment textarea is empty
acceptanceCriteria: The 'Add Comment' button is disabled when the comment textarea contains only whitespace or is empty
The button becomes enabled as soon as the user types any non-whitespace character in the comment field
The button's disabled state has appropriate visual styling to indicate it cannot be clicked
The button functionality remains unchanged when enabled - it still submits activities successfully

file_operations.description: Add state management to track the comment field value and compute whether it contains only whitespace. Add a disabled prop to the 'Add Comment' button that evaluates to true when the comment field is empty or contains only whitespace. Apply appropriate visual styling (opacity-50, cursor-not-allowed) to the button when disabled to clearly indicate its non-interactive state. Ensure the button remains fully functional when enabled.
